question: En çok satılan ürünümün satış fiyatı nedir?
query:
select
p.product_id,
p.product_description,
SUM(s.net_quantity) as total_units_sold,
case
    when SUM(s.net_quantity) = 0 then NULL 
    else SUM(s.net_amount_vat) / SUM(s.net_quantity) 
end as average_selling_price 
FROM fact_sales s 
JOIN dim_product p on s.product_id = p.product_id 
GROUP by p.product_id, p.product_description 
ORDER by total_units_sold DESC 
LIMIT 1;

question: Dün toplam satış adedi ve ciro nedir?

question: Ocak ayının ikinci haftasında satışları en çok artan (spike) ürünler hangileri? (önceki 14 gün ile kıyas)
query:
with jan_dates as (
    select distinct date_id from fact_sales
    where date_id between 20250101 and 20250131 
),
week_defs as (
    select 2 as week_no,
    MIN(date_id) as start_date, MAX(date_id) as end_date
    from jan_dates
    where extract(ISODOW from TO_DATE(date_id::text, 'YYYYMMDD')) between 1 and 7
    and date_id between 20250106 and 20250112 
),
periods as (
    select wd.week_no, wd.start_date, wd.end_date,
    (wd.start_date - 14) as prev_start_date,
    (wd.end_date - 14) as prev_end_date
    from week_defs wd 
),
base_sales as (
    select fs.product_id, fs.date_id, SUM(fs.net_quantity) as qty
    from fact_sales fs
    join periods p on fs.date_id between p.prev_start_date and p.end_date
    group by fs.product_id, fs.date_id 
),
agg as (
    select b.product_id,
    SUM(case when b.date_id between p.start_date and p.end_date then b.qty else 0 end) as qty_curr,
    SUM(case when b.date_id between p.prev_start_date and p.prev_end_date then b.qty else 0 end) as qty_prev
    from base_sales b cross join periods p
    group by b.product_id 
),
spikes as (
    select a.product_id, a.qty_prev, a.qty_curr,
    (a.qty_curr - a.qty_prev) as abs_change,
    case when a.qty_prev = 0 then null
         else (a.qty_curr::numeric / a.qty_prev::numeric - 1.0)
    end as rel_change
    from agg a 
)
select s.product_id, dp.product_description,
s.qty_prev as sales_prev_14d, s.qty_curr as sales_week2,
s.abs_change, s.rel_change
from spikes s
left join dim_product dp on dp.product_id = s.product_id
where s.qty_curr > 0
order by s.abs_change desc nulls last
limit 50;

question: Türkiye genelinde en çok stoksuz kalan şehirler hangileri? (son 90 gün)
query:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT ds.city_desc, fds.date_id, fds.store_code, fds.product_id,
    SUM(fds.available_inventory_quantity) AS avail_qty
  FROM fact_daily_stock fds
  JOIN dim_store ds ON ds.store_code = fds.store_code
  JOIN fact_replenishment_list frl ON frl.store_code = fds.store_code AND frl.product_id = fds.product_id
  WHERE ds.is_active = 1
    AND fds.date_id >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT
    AND fds.date_id <  TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')::INT
  GROUP BY ds.city_desc, fds.date_id, fds.store_code, fds.product_id
),
stockout AS (
  SELECT city_desc, date_id, store_code, product_id
  FROM daily WHERE avail_qty <= 0
)
SELECT city_desc,
  COUNT(*) AS stockout_store_sku_days,
  COUNT(DISTINCT store_code) AS stockout_store_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) AS stockout_sku_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT date_id) AS stockout_day_count
FROM stockout
GROUP BY city_desc
ORDER BY stockout_store_sku_days DESC
LIMIT 20;

question: Ürün bazında son 14 gün satış artışı en yüksek 20 ürün hangileri?
query:
with date_bounds as (
    select
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - interval '28 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT as start_28d,
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - interval '14 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT as split_14d,
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 day', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT as end_14d 
),
product_sales as (
    select fs.product_id,
    case
        when fs.date_id between db.start_28d and db.split_14d - 1 then 'prev_14d'
        when fs.date_id between db.split_14d and db.end_14d then 'last_14d'
    end as period,
    SUM(fs.net_quantity) as units
    from fact_sales fs cross join date_bounds db
    where fs.date_id between db.start_28d and db.end_14d
    group by fs.product_id, period 
),
product_pivot as (
    select product_id,
    coalesce(SUM(case when period = 'prev_14d' then units end), 0) as units_prev_14d,
    coalesce(SUM(case when period = 'last_14d' then units end), 0) as units_last_14d
    from product_sales group by product_id 
),
growth_calc as (
    select pp.product_id, pp.units_prev_14d, pp.units_last_14d,
    (pp.units_last_14d - pp.units_prev_14d) as abs_increase,
    case when pp.units_prev_14d = 0 then null
         else (pp.units_last_14d - pp.units_prev_14d)::numeric / pp.units_prev_14d
    end as pct_increase
    from product_pivot pp 
)
select g.product_id, dp.product_description,
g.units_prev_14d, g.units_last_14d, g.abs_increase, g.pct_increase
from growth_calc g
left join dim_product dp on dp.product_id = g.product_id
where g.abs_increase > 0
order by g.abs_increase desc
limit 20;

question: (2026-01-01) depo bazında toplam satılabilir stok nedir? Mağaza isimleriyle görebilir miyim?
query:

w.warehouse_code as depo_kodu,
coalesce(w.warehouse_desc, w.warehouse_code) as depo_adi,
SUM(s.available_inventory_quantity) as toplam_satilabilir_stok
from fact_daily_stock s
join dim_warehouse w on s.warehouse_code = w.warehouse_code
where s.date_id = 20260101
and w.is_blocked = false 
and w.is_default = true
group by w.warehouse_code, coalesce(w.warehouse_desc, w.warehouse_code)
order by toplam_satilabilir_stok desc;

question: B00071-210M bu ürünün bedenden arındırılmış kodu ile mağazalardaki beden dağılımını gösterir misin?

s.store_code, p.size,
SUM(ds.available_inventory_quantity) as total_avail_qty
from fact_daily_stock ds
join dim_product p on ds.product_id = p.product_id
join (
    select distinct main_product_id 
    from dim_product 
    where option_code = (select option_code from dim_product where product_id = 'B00071-210M') 
) mp on p.main_product_id = mp.main_product_id
left join dim_store s on ds.store_code = s.store_code
where ds.date_id = 20260101
and ds.store_code is not null
group by s.store_code, p.size
having SUM(ds.available_inventory_quantity) > 0
order by s.store_code, p.size
limit 50;

question: Bu fişlerin ortalama satış tutarları nedir?
query:
WITH transaction_ids AS (
    SELECT transaction_id
    FROM fact_anomaly_transaction fat
    JOIN dim_store ds ON ds.store_code = fat.store_code
    WHERE date_id = 20260126
      AND is_anomaly = 1
      AND store_name ILIKE '%ankamall%'
)
SELECT 
transaction_id,
cast(SUM(net_amount_vat) / SUM(net_quantity) as int) as avg_price
FROM fact_sales fs2
WHERE transaction_id IN (SELECT transaction_id FROM transaction_ids)
group by transaction_id
order by avg_price desc;

question: Ocak ayında mağazalarda eksik kalan ürünler neler? (stoksuz gün sayısına göre)
query:
select
store_name, product_code, product_description,
count(distinct date_id) as stock_out_day_count
FROM ( 
    select fds.date_id, ds.store_name, dp.product_code, dp.product_description,
      SUM(fds.available_inventory_quantity) as total_qty 
    from fact_daily_stock fds  
    join dim_product dp on dp.product_id = fds.product_id  
    join dim_store ds on ds.store_code = fds.store_code  
    join fact_replenishment_list frl on frl.product_id = fds.product_id and frl.store_code = fds.store_code 
    where fds.date_id between 20260101 and 20260131  
    AND ds.is_active = 1 
    group by fds.date_id, ds.store_name, dp.product_code, dp.product_description 
) s 
WHERE s.total_qty = 0  
GROUP by store_name, product_code, product_description
ORDER by stock_out_day_count desc;

question: Ocak ayında en çok mağazada eksik kalan ürünler hangileri?
query:
select 
product_code,
count(distinct store_name) as stockout_store_count
from (
    select store_name, product_code, product_description,
    count(distinct date_id) as stock_out_day_count
    FROM ( 
        select fds.date_id, ds.store_name, dp.product_code, dp.product_description,
          SUM(fds.available_inventory_quantity) as total_qty 
        from fact_daily_stock fds  
        join dim_product dp on dp.product_id = fds.product_id  
        join dim_store ds on ds.store_code = fds.store_code  
        join fact_replenishment_list frl on frl.product_id = fds.product_id and frl.store_code = fds.store_code 
        where fds.date_id between 20260101 and 20260131  
        group by fds.date_id, ds.store_name, dp.product_code, dp.product_description 
    ) s 
    WHERE s.total_qty = 0  
    GROUP by store_name, product_code, product_description
) t
group by t.product_code
order by stockout_store_count desc;

question: Ürünlerin mağaza bazlı stok durumu nedir?
query:
WITH last_day_stock AS (
SELECT fds.store_code, fds.product_id,
  SUM(GREATEST(fds.inventory_quantity,0)) AS stock_on_hand,
  SUM(GREATEST(fds.to_shipment_quantity,0)) AS stock_on_way,
  SUM(GREATEST(fds.to_remaining_order_quantity,0)) AS remaining_order_quantity
FROM fact_daily_stock fds 
JOIN dim_store ds ON ds.store_code = fds.store_code AND ds.is_active = 1
JOIN dim_warehouse dw ON dw.warehouse_code = fds.warehouse_code AND dw.store_code = fds.store_code
WHERE dw.is_excluded_warehouse <> 1
AND fds.date_id = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')::int
GROUP BY fds.store_code, fds.product_id
)
SELECT * FROM last_day_stock;

question: Ürünlerin mağaza bazlı satışları nedir?
query:
WITH params AS (
SELECT
  CAST(TO_CHAR(current_date - INTERVAL '28 day', 'YYYYMMDD') AS int) AS d28,
  CAST(TO_CHAR(current_date - INTERVAL '21 day', 'YYYYMMDD') AS int) AS d21,
  CAST(TO_CHAR(current_date - INTERVAL '14 day', 'YYYYMMDD') AS int) AS d14,
  CAST(TO_CHAR(current_date - INTERVAL '7 day',  'YYYYMMDD') AS int) AS d7,
  CAST(TO_CHAR(current_date - INTERVAL '1 day',  'YYYYMMDD') AS int) AS d1
),
sales AS (
SELECT fs.store_code, fs.product_id,
  GREATEST(SUM(fs.net_quantity) FILTER (WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN p.d7  AND p.d1), 0) AS sales_l7,
  GREATEST(SUM(fs.net_quantity) FILTER (WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN p.d14 AND p.d1), 0) AS sales_l14,
  GREATEST(SUM(fs.net_quantity) FILTER (WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN p.d21 AND p.d1), 0) AS sales_l21,
  GREATEST(SUM(fs.net_quantity) FILTER (WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN p.d28 AND p.d1), 0) AS sales_l28
FROM fact_sales fs
JOIN params p ON TRUE
JOIN dim_store ds ON ds.store_code = fs.store_code AND ds.is_active = 1
GROUP BY fs.store_code, fs.product_id
)
SELECT * FROM sales;

question: Satış ve Stok verisini ürün bazlı gösterir misin?
query:
WITH perf AS (
SELECT
  COALESCE(sa.store_code, st.store_code) AS store_code,
  COALESCE(sa.product_id, st.product_id) AS product_id,
  COALESCE(sa.sales_l7,0)  AS sales_l7,
  COALESCE(sa.sales_l14,0) AS sales_l14,
  COALESCE(sa.sales_l21,0) AS sales_l21,
  COALESCE(sa.sales_l28,0) AS sales_l28,
  COALESCE(st.stock_on_hand,0) + COALESCE(st.stock_on_way,0) + COALESCE(st.remaining_order_quantity,0) AS total_store_stock
FROM sales sa
FULL JOIN last_day_stock st ON st.store_code = sa.store_code AND st.product_id = sa.product_id
)
SELECT * FROM perf;

question: Cover ve Stok durumlarını gösterir misin?
query:
WITH statu AS (
SELECT p.*,
  CASE
    WHEN total_store_stock <= 0 THEN 0
    WHEN sales_l7  > 0 THEN total_store_stock * 1.0 / sales_l7
    WHEN sales_l14 > 0 THEN total_store_stock * 2.0 / sales_l14
    WHEN sales_l21 > 0 THEN total_store_stock * 3.0 / sales_l21
    WHEN sales_l28 > 0 THEN total_store_stock * 4.0 / sales_l28
    ELSE 999
  END AS cover,
  CASE
    WHEN total_store_stock <= 0 THEN 'Out of Stock'
    WHEN (...cover calc...) <= 3 THEN 'Running Out of Stock'
    ELSE 'In Stock'
  END AS store_stock_statu
FROM perf p
)
SELECT * FROM statu;

question: Mağaza bazında Running Out oranı nedir?
query:
WITH store_pct AS (
SELECT store_code,
  COUNT(*) AS total_skus,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE store_stock_statu = 'Running Out of Stock') AS running_out_skus,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE store_stock_statu = 'Running Out of Stock') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS pct_running_out_of_stock
FROM statu
GROUP BY store_code
)
SELECT * FROM store_pct;

question: Kategori bazında en çok satan kategorilerim neler?
query:
WITH last_7_days AS (
  SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days','YYYYMMDD')::INT AS start_date,
         TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day','YYYYMMDD')::INT AS end_date
)
SELECT
  p.product_hierarchy_02 AS category_level_2,
  p.product_hierarchy_03 AS category_level_3,
  SUM(s.net_quantity) AS total_units_sold,
  SUM(s.local_net_amount_wovat) AS total_revenue_wovat
FROM fact_sales s
JOIN dim_product p ON s.product_id = p.product_id
CROSS JOIN last_7_days d
WHERE s.date_id BETWEEN d.start_date AND d.end_date
  AND s.net_quantity > 0
GROUP BY p.product_hierarchy_02, p.product_hierarchy_03
ORDER BY total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: Geçen yıl bugüne göre satış değişimim nasıl?
query:
WITH today AS (
  SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')::INT AS date_id
),
this_year AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_amount_wovat),0) AS sales_wovat
  FROM fact_sales fs
  CROSS JOIN today t
  WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE),'YYYYMMDD')::INT AND t.date_id
    AND fs.net_quantity > 0
),
last_year AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_amount_wovat),0) AS sales_wovat
  FROM fact_sales fs
  CROSS JOIN today t
  WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'),'YYYYMMDD')::INT
    AND TO_CHAR((CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'),'YYYYMMDD')::INT
    AND fs.net_quantity > 0
)
SELECT
  ty.sales_wovat AS this_year_sales_wovat,
  ly.sales_wovat AS last_year_sales_wovat,
  (ty.sales_wovat - ly.sales_wovat) AS diff_sales_wovat,
  CASE WHEN ly.sales_wovat = 0 THEN NULL
       ELSE (ty.sales_wovat - ly.sales_wovat) / ly.sales_wovat
  END AS pct_change
FROM this_year ty, last_year ly;

question: Geçen haftaya göre ortalama fiyat değişimim nedir?
query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT  AS last7_start,
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT   AS last7_end,
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT AS prev7_start,
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '8 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT  AS prev7_end
),
periods AS (
  SELECT 'last7' AS period, p.last7_start AS start_date, p.last7_end AS end_date FROM params p
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'prev7' AS period, p.prev7_start AS start_date, p.prev7_end AS end_date FROM params p
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    pr.period,
    SUM(fs.net_amount_wovat) AS total_net_amount,
    SUM(fs.net_quantity) AS total_units,
    CASE WHEN SUM(fs.net_quantity) = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE SUM(fs.net_amount_wovat) / SUM(fs.net_quantity)
    END AS avg_price
  FROM fact_sales fs
  JOIN periods pr ON fs.date_id BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date
  WHERE fs.net_quantity > 0
  GROUP BY pr.period
)
SELECT * FROM agg ORDER BY period DESC;

question: Fiyat değişim trendinde bir problem var mı?
query:
WITH date_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT AS start_14,
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT  AS start_7,
    TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day', 'YYYYMMDD')::INT   AS end_1
),
period_prices AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN fs.date_id BETWEEN db.start_14 AND db.start_7 - 1 THEN 'prev_7'
      WHEN fs.date_id BETWEEN db.start_7 AND db.end_1 THEN 'last_7'
    END AS period,
    SUM(fs.net_amount_wovat) AS revenue_excl_vat,
    SUM(fs.net_quantity) AS units
  FROM fact_sales fs
  CROSS JOIN date_bounds db
  WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN db.start_14 AND db.end_1
    AND fs.net_quantity > 0
  GROUP BY CASE
    WHEN fs.date_id BETWEEN db.start_14 AND db.start_7 - 1 THEN 'prev_7'
    WHEN fs.date_id BETWEEN db.start_7 AND db.end_1 THEN 'last_7'
  END
)
SELECT
  period,
  revenue_excl_vat,
  units,
  CASE WHEN units = 0 THEN NULL ELSE revenue_excl_vat / units END AS avg_price
FROM period_prices
ORDER BY period DESC;

question: 20.01.2026 tarihinden önceki son 4 hafta için satış trendi artan mağazaları getir
query:
WITH weekly_store_sales AS (
  SELECT
    fs.store_code,
    ds.store_name,
    date_trunc('week', to_date(fs.date_id::text, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS sales_week,
    SUM(fs.net_quantity) AS total_sales_qty
  FROM fact_sales fs
  JOIN dim_store ds ON fs.store_code = ds.store_code
  WHERE ds.is_active = 1
    AND fs.date_id BETWEEN 20251223 AND 20260120
  GROUP BY fs.store_code, ds.store_name, date_trunc('week', to_date(fs.date_id::text, 'YYYYMMDD'))
),
last_4_weeks AS (
  SELECT * FROM weekly_store_sales
  WHERE sales_week >= date_trunc('week', DATE '2026-01-20') - INTERVAL '3 weeks'
    AND sales_week <= date_trunc('week', DATE '2026-01-20')
),
ranked_weeks AS (
  SELECT store_code, store_name, sales_week, total_sales_qty,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY store_code ORDER BY sales_week) AS week_rank
  FROM last_4_weeks
),
trend_calc AS (
  SELECT cur.store_code, cur.store_name,
         AVG(cur.total_sales_qty - prev.total_sales_qty) AS avg_weekly_change
  FROM ranked_weeks cur
  JOIN ranked_weeks prev ON cur.store_code = prev.store_code AND cur.week_rank = prev.week_rank + 1
  GROUP BY cur.store_code, cur.store_name
)
SELECT store_code, store_name, avg_weekly_change
FROM trend_calc
WHERE avg_weekly_change > 0
ORDER BY avg_weekly_change DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: 18.01.2026 tarihinden önceki son 4 hafta için satış trendi artan mağazaları getir
query:
WITH daily_store_sales AS (
  SELECT fs.store_code, fs.date_id, SUM(fs.net_quantity) AS total_qty
  FROM fact_sales fs
  JOIN dim_store ds ON fs.store_code = ds.store_code
  WHERE ds.is_active = 1
    AND fs.date_id BETWEEN 20251222 AND 20260117
  GROUP BY fs.store_code, fs.date_id
),
weekly_store_sales AS (
  SELECT store_code,
         DATE_TRUNC('week', TO_DATE(date_id::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS week_start,
         SUM(total_qty) AS week_qty
  FROM daily_store_sales
  GROUP BY store_code, DATE_TRUNC('week', TO_DATE(date_id::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD'))
),
last_4_weeks AS (
  SELECT * FROM weekly_store_sales
  WHERE week_start >= DATE_TRUNC('week', DATE '2026-01-18') - INTERVAL '4 weeks'
    AND week_start < DATE_TRUNC('week', DATE '2026-01-18')
),
trend_calc AS (
  SELECT store_code, week_start, week_qty,
         LAG(week_qty) OVER (PARTITION BY store_code ORDER BY week_start) AS prev_week_qty
  FROM last_4_weeks
)
SELECT
  store_code,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE week_qty > prev_week_qty AND prev_week_qty IS NOT NULL) AS weeks_with_increase,
  COUNT(*) AS total_weeks,
  SUM(CASE WHEN week_qty > prev_week_qty AND prev_week_qty IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::DECIMAL
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*) - 1, 0) AS increase_ratio
FROM trend_calc
GROUP BY store_code
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
  AND SUM(CASE WHEN week_qty > prev_week_qty AND prev_week_qty IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY increase_ratio DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50;

question: Sezon STR'si en yüksek olan ürünlerim neler?
query:
SELECT
  fpp.product_id,
  SUM(fpp.sales_cumulative) AS total_sales,
  SUM(fpp.start_day_stock) AS total_initial_stock,
  CASE WHEN SUM(fpp.start_day_stock) = 0 THEN NULL
       ELSE SUM(fpp.sales_cumulative)::NUMERIC / SUM(fpp.start_day_stock)
  END AS season_str
FROM fact_product_performance fpp
GROUP BY fpp.product_id
HAVING SUM(fpp.start_day_stock) > 0
ORDER BY season_str DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: 2025 kapanış için (1 Ocak 2026 öncesi) mağaza bazlı satış-stok payını hesaplayıp dengesizleri listeler misin?
query:
WITH sales_per_store AS (
  SELECT fs.store_code, SUM(fs.net_quantity) AS total_units_sold
  FROM fact_sales fs
  WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN 20250101 AND 20251231
    AND fs.net_quantity > 0
  GROUP BY fs.store_code
),
stock_per_store AS (
  SELECT fds.store_code, SUM(fds.available_inventory_quantity) AS total_available_stock
  FROM fact_daily_stock fds
  WHERE fds.date_id = 20251231
  GROUP BY fds.store_code
),
store_totals AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(s.store_code, st.store_code) AS store_code,
    COALESCE(s.total_units_sold, 0) AS total_units_sold,
    COALESCE(st.total_available_stock, 0) AS total_available_stock
  FROM sales_per_store s
  FULL OUTER JOIN stock_per_store st ON s.store_code = st.store_code
),
shares AS (
  SELECT st.store_code, st.total_units_sold, st.total_available_stock,
    st.total_units_sold * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(st.total_units_sold) OVER(), 0) AS sales_share,
    st.total_available_stock * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(st.total_available_stock) OVER(), 0) AS stock_share
  FROM store_totals st
)
SELECT store_code, total_units_sold, total_available_stock,
  ROUND(sales_share * 100, 2) AS sales_share_pct,
  ROUND(stock_share * 100, 2) AS stock_share_pct,
  ROUND((stock_share - sales_share) * 100, 2) AS imbalance_pct
FROM shares
ORDER BY ABS(stock_share - sales_share) DESC
LIMIT 50;

question: Son 5 haftadaki satış tutarı değişimini açıklar mısın? 26.01.2026 tarihinden önceki 5 hafta için.
query:
WITH weeks AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT date_id,
    to_char(to_date(date_id::text, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'IYYY-IW') AS iso_year_week
  FROM fact_sales
  WHERE date_id BETWEEN 20251215 AND 20260125
),
weekly_sales AS (
  SELECT w.iso_year_week,
    MIN(w.date_id) AS week_start_date_id,
    MAX(w.date_id) AS week_end_date_id,
    SUM(fs.local_net_amount_wovat) AS sales_amount
  FROM weeks w
  JOIN fact_sales fs ON fs.date_id = w.date_id AND fs.net_quantity > 0
  GROUP BY w.iso_year_week
),
last_5_weeks AS (
  SELECT * FROM weekly_sales ORDER BY week_end_date_id DESC LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  iso_year_week, week_start_date_id, week_end_date_id, sales_amount,
  LAG(sales_amount) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date_id) AS prev_week_sales,
  CASE WHEN LAG(sales_amount) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date_id) = 0 THEN NULL
       ELSE (sales_amount - LAG(sales_amount) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date_id))
  END AS abs_change,
  CASE WHEN LAG(sales_amount) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date_id) = 0 THEN NULL
       ELSE (sales_amount - LAG(sales_amount) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date_id))
            / LAG(sales_amount) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date_id)
  END AS pct_change
FROM last_5_weeks
ORDER BY week_end_date_id;

question: Satış adedi sezonsal beklenti ile uyumlu mu?
query:
WITH this_period AS (
  SELECT s.store_code, COALESCE(SUM(fs.net_quantity), 0) AS qty_this
  FROM fact_sales fs
  JOIN dim_store s ON s.store_code = fs.store_code
  WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN 20251222 AND 20260125
    AND fs.net_quantity > 0
  GROUP BY s.store_code
),
last_year AS (
  SELECT s.store_code, COALESCE(SUM(fs.net_quantity), 0) AS qty_last
  FROM fact_sales fs
  JOIN dim_store s ON s.store_code = fs.store_code
  WHERE fs.date_id BETWEEN 20241223 AND 20250126
    AND fs.net_quantity > 0
  GROUP BY s.store_code
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(t.store_code, l.store_code) AS store_code,
    COALESCE(t.qty_this, 0) AS qty_this,
    COALESCE(l.qty_last, 0) AS qty_last
  FROM this_period t
  FULL OUTER JOIN last_year l ON t.store_code = l.store_code
),
totals AS (
  SELECT SUM(qty_this) AS total_this, SUM(qty_last) AS total_last FROM combined
)
SELECT
  total_this, total_last,
  (total_this - total_last) AS diff,
  ROUND((total_this - total_last) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_last, 0), 2) AS pct_change
FROM totals;

question: Son 2 aydaki Clearence ürünleri getir.
query:
with params as (  
	SELECT  
	TO_CHAR((CURRENT_DATE - interval '2 months'),'YYYYMMDD')::INT as date_from,
	TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 day','YYYYMMDD')::INT as date_to,
	TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 day','YYYYMMDD')::INT as snapshot_date 
)
,sales as ( 
	-- Bu zamana kadar option bazında satılmış ürünlerin toplam adetleri;
	select
	dp.option_code,
	SUM(fs.net_quantity) as total_sales_qty 
	from fact_sales fs 
	join dim_product dp on dp.product_id = fs.product_id 
	join dim_store ds on ds.store_code = fs.store_code
	where ds.is_active = 1
	group by dp.option_code 
)
,stock as ( 
	-- son gün stoğundaki ana depo ve mağaza stokları toplamı.
	select
	dp.option_code,
	fds.store_code,
	fds.warehouse_code,
	SUM(case when dw.is_distribution_warehouse = 1 then fds.available_inventory_quantity else 0 end) as dc_avail_qty,
	SUM(case when fds.store_code != '' and ds.is_active = 1 then fds.available_inventory_quantity else 0 end) as store_avail_qty 
	from fact_daily_stock fds 
	join params p on TRUE 
	join dim_product dp on dp.product_id = fds.product_id 
	left join dim_warehouse dw on dw.warehouse_code = fds.warehouse_code 
	left join dim_store ds on ds.store_code = fds.store_code
	where fds.date_id = p.snapshot_date 
	group by dp.option_code, fds.store_code, fds.warehouse_code
)
,str_calc as ( 
	select
	s.option_code,
    SUM(s.total_sales_qty) as total_sales_qty,
    SUM(coalesce(st.dc_avail_qty, 0)) as dc_avail_qty,
    SUM(coalesce(st.store_avail_qty, 0)) as store_avail_qty,
    SUM(s.total_sales_qty + coalesce(st.dc_avail_qty, 0) + coalesce(st.store_avail_qty, 0)) as total_supply,
  	case
		when SUM(s.total_sales_qty + coalesce(st.dc_avail_qty, 0) + coalesce(st.store_avail_qty, 0)) = 0 then 0  
		else SUM(s.total_sales_qty)::numeric / SUM(s.total_sales_qty + coalesce(st.dc_avail_qty, 0) + coalesce(st.store_avail_qty, 0)) 
	end as str_ratio 
	from sales s 
	left join stock st on st.option_code = s.option_code
	group by s.option_code
)
,size_stock as ( -- ANA DEPO MAĞAZA KURGUSU OLACAK.
	select
    dp.option_code,
    dp.size,
	SUM(fds.available_inventory_quantity) as size_avail_qty 
	from fact_daily_stock fds 
	join dim_product dp on dp.product_id = fds.product_id 
	join params p on TRUE 
	left join dim_warehouse dw on dw.warehouse_code = fds.warehouse_code 
	left join dim_store ds on ds.store_code = fds.store_code
	where fds.date_id = p.snapshot_date 
	and (dw.is_distribution_warehouse = 1 or (fds.store_code != '' and ds.is_active = 1))
	group by dp.option_code, dp.size 	
)
,size_broken as (
	select
    ss.option_code,
    COUNT(*) filter (where ss.size_avail_qty > 0) as sizes_with_stock, 
    count(*) sizes_count
    from size_stock ss 
	group by ss.option_code 
	having COUNT(*) filter (where ss.size_avail_qty > 0) > 0 and COUNT(*) filter (where ss.size_avail_qty <= 0) > 0  
)
,clearance_products as ( 
	select
	DISTINCT sc.option_code,
	sc.str_ratio,
	sizes_with_stock * 1.0 / sizes_count as broken_product_ratio,
	store_avail_qty + dc_avail_qty as total_stock
	from str_calc sc 
	left join size_broken sb on sb.option_code = sc.option_code 
	where sc.total_sales_qty > 0  
	and sc.str_ratio >= 0.8 
	and (sizes_with_stock * 1.0 / sizes_count) < 0.6 --kırıkLIK ORANI VERİLMEZSE BU KABUL EDİLLİR, YOKSA İNPUT GİRİLİR. SOURABİLİR.
	and (store_avail_qty + dc_avail_qty) > 0
) 
SELECT   
cp.option_code,
dp.product_description,
str_ratio,
broken_product_ratio,
total_stock
FROM clearance_products cp 
join dim_product dp on dp.option_code = cp.option_code
GROUP by cp.option_code, dp.product_description,str_ratio,broken_product_ratio,total_stock
ORDER by total_stock DESC;
